10 years of places we never meant to go

The best trips were never on the bucket list.

Porto
"I only booked because the fare was ridiculous. Three years later I'd learned Portuguese."
Meg · member since 2019
Bergamo
"Booked for a weekend. Came home a week later having changed my mind about a lot of things."
Sam · member since 2021
Tbilisi
"My favourite trip ever started with a destination I genuinely couldn't pronounce."
Priya · member since 2018
